sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 49.7g. polyunsaturated fat, omega3, and cholesterol are doing most of the work. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 49.7g. polyunsaturated fat, omega3, and cholesterol are doing most of the work. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 23.4g. fibre is where the section starts to wobble. for a seed, this is a very strong sign.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 17.7g. the amino acid profile is carrying real weight. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 17.7g. the amino acid profile is carrying real weight. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 2% DV, vitamin b12 at 0% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin e at 2% DV, vitamin b12 at 0% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 88% DV, calcium at 98% DV, iron at 81% DV stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 88% DV, calcium at 98% DV, iron at 81% DV stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. elite mineral density because the mineral payload is a major category strength beyond a normal seed baseline. easy to use across lots of foods because works well in savoury dishes, baking, and toppings. strong wholefood seed identity because feels like a very legitimate seed-category food rather than an edge case.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. contains some anti-nutrients because phytates may reduce mineral uptake somewhat. not suitable for everyone because sesame allergy risk matters in practice. saturated fat is not negligible because still not a disaster, but it is less clean than the best fat-profile seeds.

closing.summary: Sesame Seeds stands out for elite mineral density and easy to use across lots of foods. but it also gets held back by contains some anti-nutrients and not suitable for everyone. Best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
